paper_title: Visual Position Prompt for MLLM Based Visual Grounding

method.name: VPP-LLaVA
components: Global VPP for global position reference
Local VPP for local position reference
method.advantages: Requires fewer training samples compared to other MLLMs like MiniGPT-v2
method.availability: Code and VPP-SFT dataset available at https://github.com/WayneTomas/VPP-LLaVA

key_findings: MLLMs like LLaVA-v1.5 show inaccuracies in visual grounding (size and shape issues)
Providing positional references significantly improves spatial understanding
Models struggle with precise coordinate alignment with spatial information
limitations: MLLMs still face challenges in precise spatial reasoning
Models struggle to effectively interpret and utilize spatial cues
Need for more effective strategies to improve spatial alignment and object localization
title: Visual Position Prompt for MLLM Based Visual Grounding
